401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: You are not authorized to access this resource

402.title: Payment Required
402.description: Payment is required to access this resource

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: You are prohibited from accessing this resource

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.description: This resource does not accept this method

407.title: Proxy Authentication Required
407.description: You must first authenticate with the proxy to access this resource.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.description: The server has timed out waiting for your request

409.title: Conflict
409.description: Your request could not be completed because it conflicts with the server's resources.

410.title: Gone
410.description: The requested resource has been permanently deleted.

411.title: Length Required
411.description: The server refuses to accept the request without a defined Content-Length.

412.title: Precondition Failed
412.description: The server does not meet one of the preconditions specified by the client.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.description: The request payload is larger than the server is willing or able to process.

414.title: URI Too Long
414.description: The URI provided is too long for the server to interpret.

415.title: Unsupported Media Type
415.description: The format of the requested data is not supported by the server.

416.title: Range Not Satisfiable
416.description: The client requested a portion of a file that the server cannot provide.

417.title: Expectation Failed
417.description: The server cannot meet the requirements of the Expect request-header field.

421.title: Misdirected Request
421.description: The request was directed at a server that is not able to produce a response.

422.title: Unprocessable Content
422.description: The request was well-formed but contains semantic errors.

423.title: Locked
423.description: The resource that is being accessed is locked.

424.title: Failed Dependency
424.description: The request failed because it depended on another action that failed.

425.title: Too Early
425.description: The server is unwilling to risk processing a request that might be replayed.

426.title: Upgrade Required
426.description: The client should switch to a different protocol.

428.title: Precondition Required
428.description: The origin server requires the request to be conditional.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

431.title: Request Header Fields Too Large
431.description: The server refuses to process the request because its header fields are too large.

451.title: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
451.description: The server is denying access to the resource as a consequence of a legal demand.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.description: An unexpected condition on the server prevented it from fulfilling the request.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.description: The server does not recognize the request method, or lacks the ability to fulfill it.

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.description: The server received an invalid response from the upstream server while acting as a gateway.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: The server is temporarily unable to handle the request due to maintenance or overloading.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.description: The gateway server did not receive a timely response from the upstream server.

505.title: HTTP Version Not Supported
505.description: The server does not support the HTTP protocol version used in the request.

506.title: Variant Also Negotiates
506.description: Transparent content negotiation for the request results in a circular reference.

507.title: Insufficient Storage
507.description: The server is unable to store the representation needed to complete the request.

508.title: Loop Detected
508.description: The server detected an infinite loop while processing the request.

510.title: Not Extended
510.description: Further extensions to the request are required for the server to fulfill it.

511.title: Network Authentication Required
511.description: The client needs to authenticate to gain network access.
